data.name: Challenge_Error_InvalidStatus
data.value: This challenge cannot be modified in its current state.

data.name: Challenge_Error_SiteRequired
data.value: A site address is required for the "site" scope.

data.name: Error_Unauthorized
data.value: You are not authorized to perform this action.

data.name: Error_FieldsRequired
data.value: All required fields must be filled.

data.name: Error_ConflictOpposite
data.value: A rule exists for "{2}" with action "{0}" which conflicts.

data.name: Error_ConflictDuplicate
data.value: A rule already exists for "{0}" on {1}.

data.name: Warning_AlreadyAssigned
data.value: Device "{0}" is already assigned to another profile.

data.name: Warning_DeviceConflictExists
data.value: Warning: the following devices have an opposing rule for '{0}': {1}. The profile rule (most restrictive) will apply.

data.name: Schedule_Error_Unauthorized
data.value: You are not authorised to modify this time window.

data.name: Schedule_Error_TimeRange
data.value: Start time must be earlier than end time.

data.name: Schedule_Error_Days
data.value: Please select at least one day.

data.name: TempAuth_Error_Unauthorized
data.value: You are not authorised to revoke this authorization.

data.name: TempAuth_Error_InvalidDuration
data.value: Duration must be between 1 and 1440 minutes.

data.name: Schedule_Error_InvalidDestination
data.value: Invalid destination for the selected type.

data.name: TempAuth_Error_InvalidAllowDestination
data.value: Invalid destination for the selected type.
